body: TUNGSTEN SMITHING -- pass 26 report. Shipped WARRANT#39 -> SLS(54)/9.68: forge-edge-2 r4 (driver fingerprint). This is the family design composition point -- extended the relationship cache from WARRANT#34/35 with outcome-linked sums so pairwise agree/conflict states can be tied to real trade outcomes (RI_PairwiseLift), plus a stability tier and a combined driver-fingerprint summary. Marginal + pairwise implemented; ablation honestly deferred (real counterfactual re-fit needs its own design). Compiled clean, identity invariant verified. 7 warrants shipped this session (#33-39): both agents measurement layers are substantially built (edge-2 r1-r4, indicate r1-r3). Continuing to forge-indicate r4 (score calibration) next.
